title: Sisyphus's Worst Day (again)
description:
Sisyphus’s Worst Day (Again) is an isometric 3D puzzle game where you manipulate the environment and place clever traps to keep Sisyphus from ever reaching the summit.

Turn eternal punishment into your personal playground as you design devious systems, experiment with trap combinations, and trap the world’s most persistent worker in an infinite loop of failure.

Blending Greek myth with the absurdity of a 21st-century office grind, the game delivers a darkly comedic take on productivity, repetition, and the meaninglessness of… well, endlessly pushing that boulder.
description_short: Build traps, manipulate the environment, and engineer the perfect loop to keep Sisyphus from ever reaching the summit in this comedic isometric 3D puzzle game.
